challenge.title: Korak 1
challenge.description:
U ovoj radionici ćete kreirati aplikaciju Emoji Reactor. Osnovna struktura HTML i CSS je već uklonjena.

Počnite kreiranjem komponente za main.

Unutar elementa sa main kreiraj element sa h1 koji ima class od title i tekst za How are you feeling today?.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Emoji Reactor</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./styles.css" />
</head>
<body>
  
</body>
</html>

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš h1 kao dete od main.
Element h1 treba da ima tekst od How are you feeling today?.
tests.testString: assert.equal(document.querySelector("main > h1")?.textContent.trim(), "How are you feeling today?");

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
How are you feeling today?

Click on the buttons below to rate your emotions.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script
